auth.loginSubtitle: Use Pi authentication, then connect to Firebase for live rankings, messages, transfers, payments, and language sync.
auth.step1Text: Request username and payments scope directly from Pi Browser.
auth.step2Text: Sign in anonymously to satisfy Firestore security and map the Pi account to your profile.
auth.step3Text: Select your sport, role, language, badges, and stats to appear in rankings.

landing.title: Your talent. Their dream. One connection.
landing.subtitle: ScoutMe unifies multi-sport discovery, live rankings, direct transfer offers, Pi-powered upgrades, and an immersive metaverse hall for athletes and clubs worldwide.
landing.feature1Text: Dynamic athlete profiles with sport-specific roles, stats, media, badges, and visibility controls.
landing.feature2Text: Offer, negotiate, accept, and promote historic moves directly from a real-time transfer board.
landing.feature3Text: Explore an A-Frame hall of fame, sport zones, and clickable player panels inside Pi Browser.
landing.stackSubtitle: Firebase powers authentication, Firestore sync, offline persistence, rules, ranking updates, transfers, messaging, and notifications.
landing.stackAuth: Authenticate with Pi, create user profiles, and sync wallet-aware actions to Firestore.
landing.stackData: Leaderboard, messages, offers, hall-of-fame cards, and dashboards react instantly with listeners.
landing.stackI18n: Eleven languages, persistent preferences, and Arabic right-to-left rendering are built in.

dashboard.title: Performance Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Your live command center for scouting, ranking, messages, and Pi actions.
dashboard.performanceText: Momentum based on talent, activity, reviews, and media updates.
dashboard.noRecommendations: Recommendations will appear after more activity.

profile.title: Athlete & Club Profile
profile.subtitle: Configure role, sport, stats, badges, media, and preferred language.
profile.defaultBio: This profile is ready for scouting and direct club outreach.
profile.contactText: Unlock direct outreach through Pi payment or continue in real-time chat.

ranking.title: Realtime Global Rankings
ranking.subtitle: Track the smartest leaderboard with sport and country filters plus SVG score rings.

transfer.title: Transfer Market
transfer.subtitle: Clubs send offers, players approve or reject, and big deals enter the Hall of Fame.
transfer.marketSubtitle: Live offers and negotiation status updates.
transfer.hallBoostText: Promote an accepted move into the Hall of Fame via Pi payment.
transfer.hallBoostAction: Pay 3 Pi for Hall of Fame

chat.title: Realtime Chat
chat.subtitle: Instant direct messages with seen state, typing indicator, and online presence.

hall.title: Hall of Fame
hall.subtitle: Celebrate the biggest sporting moves and spotlight elite verified talent.

metaverse.title: 3D ScoutMe Museum
metaverse.subtitle: Click any player panel to open the profile.
metaverse.subtitleLong: Navigate a 3D sports museum, discover talent zones, and jump to profiles.
